summary: Initialized shared photonic_projects baseline with pipeline-first structure for three topics.
Current stage is project bootstrap; no scientific claims yet, only executable scaffolding and synthetic sanity checks.
Created phase0 scripts and configs for PNO, PRC, and meta-adapt; generated initial figures and metrics.
Outputs are engineering scaffolds, not publishable scientific evidence; next action is trustworthy solver integration and controlled ablations.
Entered autonomous phase-1 simulations for PNO/PRC/meta-adapt as requested.
Ran phase1 scripts and produced per-topic quantitative metrics.
Observed trend-level support for branch complementarity, gain tradeoff, and local adaptation efficiency in toy models.
Claims remain bounded; next step is trustworthy baselines and richer nonstationary/parallel protocols.
Refined meta-adapt classifier calibration and reran all phase1 simulations.
Observed weak shift severity in meta-adapt; next run should increase perturbation strength and repeated-shift protocol.
Planned phase2 iterative loop with execute->assess->replan gating for all three topics.
Executed phase2 simulation scripts across PNO/PRC/meta-adapt.
Evaluated topic states and computed content-gate readiness for LPR/AP-style draft packaging.
All three gates passed; stopped iterative loop and transitioned to paper-pack preparation stage.
